notes: It is advisable to stop eating and drinking at least 5 minutes before Sub'h Sādiq. Salāt should not be performed during the 10 minutes before Zawāl. Programmes in the Masjid during Ramadhān: Dars e Qur'ān (Urdu/English) - see notice board for details; Short Lesson on Hadīth (English) after Fajr. Programmes via the receiver only: Urdu after Zuhr, English after Maghrib.
